updates.title: North Pacific Fishery Management Council; Public Meeting
updates.summary: The North Pacific Fishery Management Council (Council) Fishery Monitoring Advisory Committee (FMAC) will meet May 18, 2026.

updates.title: North Pacific Fishery Management Council; Notice of Public Meeting
updates.summary: North Pacific Fishery Management Council will host a meeting of the Council Coordination Committee (CCC), consisting of the Regional Fishery Management Council chairs, vice chairs, and executive directors on May 19 through May 21, 2026.

updates.title: Operating Limitations at Chicago O'Hare International Airport, Order Establishing Scheduling Limits
updates.summary: This action amends the effective date for the Order Establishing Scheduling Limits at Chicago O'Hare International Airport (ORD) published on April 20, 2026. The Order was issued with an effective date of May 17, 2026, and an expiration date of October 24, 2026.

updates.title: Airworthiness Directives; The Boeing Company Airplanes
updates.summary: The FAA proposes to adopt a new airworthiness directive (AD) for all The Boeing Company Model 737-600, -700, -700C, -800, -900, and -900ER series airplanes. This proposed AD was prompted by reports of fuselage skin cracks found near the aft drain mast. This proposed AD would require inspection of the aft drain mast area and surrounding fuselage skin for any repair, repetitive inspections of the fuselage skin and stru

updates.title: Takes of Marine Mammals Incidental to Specified Activities; Taking Marine Mammals Incidental to U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Miller Sands Island, Rice Island, and Cottonwood Island Pile Dike Repairs Projects on the Lower Columbia River in Oregon and Washington
